```js title=main.js
"use strict";
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["main"], {
"./app.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  app: () => (app)
});
/* import */ var _lib__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./lib.js");

var app = function () {
	_lib__rspack_import_0.result;
};
var app2 = () => {
	secret;
};

var app4 = (0,_lib__rspack_import_0.something)("app4"),
	app5 = 10000;

var app3 = (0,_lib__rspack_import_0.something)("app3");


},
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
/* import */ var _app__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./app.js");

(0,_app__rspack_import_0.app)();


},
"./lib.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  result: () => (result),
  something: () => (something)
});
const secret = "888";
const result = 20000;
const something = function () {};


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
var __rspack_exec = function(moduleId) { return __rspack_require(__rspack_require.s = moduleId) }
var __rspack_exports = (__rspack_exec("./index.js"));

}
]);
```
